all_candidates.topic: Should companies mandate office presence during extreme weather?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A viral WhatsApp chat showed a manager insisting an employee come to office during heavy Pune rains (July 9, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Should government control fuel prices despite global changes?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Petrol/diesel prices remained unchanged despite global crude fluctuations, prompting Arvind Kejriwal's demand for lower prices (July 9, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Are Indian cities prepared for extreme monsoon events?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Monsoon fury battered India, causing floods in cities like Delhi, Gujarat, and Maharashtra this past week (July 9, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Are AI-driven layoffs justified for productivity gains?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Estimates show 25,000-35,000 jobs could be cut in Indian IT in 2026 due to AI-driven productivity improvements (July 9, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Should restaurants offer free food as a marketing strategy?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A viral video of people queuing for free food in Bengaluru sparked debate about the ethics of such marketing (July 3, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Should social media platforms be fully liable for CSEM?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India directed Instagram to disable CSEM ads/content and report within 7 days (July 6, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Is a "top to bottom" NTA revamp sufficient to fix exam issues?
all_candidates.news_anchor: After recent exam controversies, a "top to bottom" revamp of the National Testing Agency (NTA) for NEET-UG 2027 was announced (July 9, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Should companies face stricter penalties for misleading food labels?
all_candidates.news_anchor: FSSAI issued notices to Lotte India and two other companies for misleading claims and labelling violations (July 8, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Should government monitor social media feature rollouts?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Government granted Meta three more days to explain its WhatsApp username rollout (July 6, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Is integrating AI agents into search ads beneficial for consumers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Google launched an AI agent within Search ads in India, expanding Gemini-powered ad tools (July 9, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Will India's first hydrogen train revolutionize rail travel?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India's first hydrogen train is set to be flagged off on July 17, 2026, announced recently (July 8, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Will new affordable 5G phones boost digital inclusion?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Ai+ Smartphone launched Nova 2 Pro & Neo in India, entering the affordable 5G market (July 2, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Is the online objection window for exam answer keys fair?
all_candidates.news_anchor: UPTET Answer Key 2026 was released with an objection window open until July 14 (July 8, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Should Apple enable credit/debit card payments in India?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Apple is now testing credit/debit card payments for App Store and iCloud purchases in India after a five-year hiatus (July 7, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Does rising GST collection reflect a healthy economy?
all_candidates.news_anchor: GST collections for June 2026 rose to ₹1.94 lakh crore, as reported by the government (July 2, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Will new drug import ports improve pharmaceutical access?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Navi Mumbai Airport was designated as a port for drug imports, aiming to strengthen the pharmaceutical supply chain (July 6, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Should new laws protect educational institution lands?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Karnataka Government Educational Institutions Lands (Protection and Regularisation) Act, 2026, was passed (July 9, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Is extending the GST appeal deadline beneficial for businesses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The central government extended the deadline for filing GSTAT appeals until July 31, 2026 (July 2, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Are new e-Way Bill changes a burden for businesses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: GSTN's e-Way Bill changes, announced 7 days ago, are pushing firms to prepare their systems (July 2, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Does relaxing weighing instrument norms help businesses more?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Government relaxed verification norms for high-capacity weighing instruments (July 6, 2026).
